checks.name: Folder Structure Check
checks.description: Verify required folders and files exist

checks.name: Policy File Load Check
checks.description: Verify policy JSON files parse correctly

checks.name: Schema File Load Check
checks.description: Verify schema JSON files parse correctly

checks.name: Validator Refusal Path Check
checks.description: Verify validator refuses risky action without confirmation

checks.name: Validator Allow Path Check
checks.description: Verify validator allows valid action with confirmation

checks.name: Protected Path Detection Check
checks.description: Verify protected path rules trigger correctly

checks.name: Audit Write Check
checks.description: Verify audit events can be written

checks.name: Journal Write Check
checks.description: Verify journal entries can be written

checks.name: Copy Sandbox Check
checks.description: Verify copy executes safely in sandbox

checks.name: Rename Sandbox Check
checks.description: Verify rename executes safely in sandbox

checks.name: Sandbox Cleanup Check
checks.description: Verify sandbox cleanup completes after diagnostics
